chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.98 of 2015 M/s Silver Reed International (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Versus IGI Investment Bank Limited Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 645/24 2. For orders on CMA 5505/15 3. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 5506/15 Dated: 15.03.2024 Mr. Naeem Suleman for the appellants. Mr. Faiz H. Durrani for respondent. -.-.- 1) This is an application for discharge of Vakalatnama supported by affidavit and the notice issued to the appellants. They were duly informed of the intention of the counsel who seeks discharge of his Vakalatnama, yet they have neither engaged any counsel nor any representation is made on their behalf. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. The application is accordingly allowed and Vakalatnama of Mr. Naeem Suleman is discharged and consequently the appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
